title: Groshik
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Groshik |homeworld=[[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]]''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Don't count on others for help. In the end each of us is in this alone. The survivors are those who know how to look out for themselves.|Groshik, to Dessel|}} '''Groshik''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] owner on the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]] in the [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] leading up to the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|Battle of Ruusan]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. He operated the [[Groshik's cantina|cantina]] in Apatros' only [[Apatros (colony)|colony]]. In [[1003 BBY]], Groshik helped one of his friends, a [[Miner/Legends|miner]] named [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], escape arrest after [[Death/Legends|killing]] a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] in self-defense over a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]. Groshik used one of his contacts affiliated with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] to get Dessel [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] off-world, where he joined the Sith [[Army/Legends|army]]. Dessel eventually became the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Bane. ==Biography== {{Quote|Thank you, old friend. I won't forget this.''"
"''I know you won't, Des.|Dessel and Groshik, after Groshik arranged to smuggle him off-world|}} Groshik, a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]], owned and operated the lone [[Groshik's cantina|cantina]] in the only [[Apatros (colony)|colony]] on the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]]. The planet and colony were controlled by the [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company]] mining corporation. Groshik made his [[Cantina/Legends|cantina's]] interior look ostentatious and tacky, proclaiming that he did so to offend the ORO powers-that-be. This sentiment made him very popular with the [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Miner/Legends|miners]] who frequented his cantina, as many of them were stuck working for ORO because of debts and resented the company. To maximize profit at his cantina, Groshik spread his cantina's operating [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to cover both mining shifts, so he could serve the [[Standard day/Legends|night]]-crew workers before they started and the day-crew workers after their shift was over. His routine never varied and was well-known to all the miners on Apatros. In [[1003 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy]]'' from [[1003 BBY]] to [[980 BBY]]. As ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' is the trilogy's first installment, and the section of the novel including Groshik occurs before the novel's events move forward to a different point in [[Time/Legends|time]], its appearance must have been in 1003 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. Groshik's cantina was visited by members of the crew of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] cargo [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that had come to Apatros to collect cortosis from the mines. Afterward, one of the miners, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]]—a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was Groshik's friend—visited the cantina upon being suspended from the mines when he bit the thumb off a miner named [[Gerd]] during a fight. Dessel played a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] with some of the [[Republic officer/Legends|Republic officers]] in the ORO-operated gaming room of the establishment and was accused of cheating by an angry Republic [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] when he won a seemingly impossible hand. A commotion ensued, and Groshik quickly ended it by firing his [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] [[CS-33 Firespray stun rifle]] into the ceiling and ordering everyone to leave the cantina. However, he told Dessel to stay, and the two cleaned up the cantina. Groshik also told Dessel that he had been projecting waves of anger and hate while he was playing sabacc, helping to incite the riot. After Dessel left the cantina, he was attacked by three [[Republic soldier]]s, including the ensign who had accused him of cheating, but Dessel fought back and [[Death/Legends|killed]] the ensign in self-defense. Dessel raced back to the cantina, where Groshik let him in. Dessel told Groshik how he had killed the ensign and that the authorities would surely arrest him shortly. Since Dessel would serve in a [[Prison/Legends|penal]] colony if he was found by ORO, Groshik made arrangements with some of his contacts in the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] him off-world. Dessel was extremely grateful that Groshik had helped him, and he went on to fight in the Sith [[Army/Legends|army]] in the [[New Sith Wars]] upon escaping Apatros. Dessel served with distinction, and, once his [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] was discovered, he became [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Bane, one of the most influential [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Be careful, Groshik. Neimoidians aren't known for relying on their feelings. It's not good for business.|Dessel|}} A [[Color/Legends|red]]-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] Neimoidian, Groshik was a very hardworking being, one who never varied his daily routine. He was business-savvy and was able to configure his cantina's hours to serve the most people and maximize profits. He was good friends with Dessel and liked him because he had seen him grow from a young boy into a man. He would pour out [[Alcohol/Legends|drinks]] like [[Cortyg brandy]] for Dessel on occasion, whereby if Dessel did not ask for it, he did not have to pay for the drink. Groshik kept his [[Politics/Legends|political]] opinions to himself and, while he allowed political discussions in his cantina, always refused to take sides. Groshik was known for firing his [[Stun/Legends|stun]] rifle whenever things got out of hand at his cantina, such as during the near-riot after Dessel's sabacc game. The Neimoidian held some resentment toward ORO; he intentionally made his cantina look as garish as possible to irritate them, and he broke company rules by helping Dessel escape Apatros. ==Behind the scenes== Groshik appeared in [[Drew Karpyshyn]]'s [[2006]] novel, ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Groshik |es=Groshik |hu=Groshik |pl=Groshik |pt=Groshik }} [[Category:Apatros residents]] [[Category:Bartenders]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Neimoidians]]
